title: Vascularized Immunocompetent Cortical Organoids for Modeling Human Brain Development and Disease
author: Halkoluoto, Aurora
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Single-cell RNA-seq count matrices of human vascularized immunocompetent cortical organoids  
 This dataset contains single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-seq) count matrices generated from human cortical organoids (cCOs), vascularized cortical organoids (vCOs), and vascularized immunocompetent cortical organoids (viCOs) from three different donors.
steps_raw:
Single-cell RNA-seq count matrices of human vascularized immunocompetent cortical organoids  
 This dataset contains single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-seq) count matrices generated from human cortical organoids (cCOs), vascularized cortical organoids (vCOs), and vascularized immunocompetent cortical organoids (viCOs) from three different donors.
